text.title: AI PM Tool Evaluation Framework Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of ai-pm-tool-evaluation-framework. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Buyer scores a vendor on the salesperson's curated demo; real-world hallucination rate emerges only at month 3.
antipattern.fix: Run the fixture corpus before committing; reject vendors that refuse the eval.

antipattern.symptom: AI add-on cost folded into base seat; team discovers 40% YoY price hike.
antipattern.fix: Force itemisation in the contract; cap AI add-on at 30% of base.

antipattern.symptom: Buyer migrates off after 2 years; vendor refuses to export AI summaries and embeddings.
antipattern.fix: Make export rights a contract precondition.
